violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Raw animal foods (such as raw egg and raw meat) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as condiments and cooked chicken) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC rearranged items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service during inspection. Establishment to use dishwasher in kitchen area to wash/sanitize bar equipment/glassware. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Cut tomato and rice was observed past the 7 day date marking. PIC discarded items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer/cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the floor. Items must be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat and chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink and bar dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables, sauces) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
Single service items were stored on the floor in the kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of shelving located in Salad Prep Unit, Pizza Prep Unit, Walk-In Cooler and Refrigerator (pizza prep) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The floor in the ware washing area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The fans in the walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
